summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Lock in Dates and Share Availability Link features. Both backend APIs and frontend integration working perfectly.

fixed_bugs.issue: UnboundLocalError: prefs_submitted variable used before definition when processing guest data
fixed_bugs.impact: 500 error when viewing heatmap after guest submissions
fixed_bugs.fix_applied: Moved prefs_submitted = len(prefs) before guest processing section

passed_tests: GET /api/trips/{trip_id}/availability-heatmap returns locked_dates, is_owner, guest data
GET /api/trips/guest/{token} - public access without auth works
Guest data integration in availability heatmap
Frontend: Navigate to /trip/{trip_id}/availability - locked dates banner, share link section, lock buttons work
Frontend: Navigate to /guest/{token} - guest form renders with name, email, date range picker, submit button
Frontend: Guest form submission and success page display
Frontend: Guest data appears in heatmap participant grid and calculations
Notifications created for guest submissions and date locking
